program_info.capstone_thesis_requirement: None (MHCI students DO NOT complete a capstone project or thesis)

breakdown.details: One course from each core course category
Can be any type of HCI course
Can be HCI courses or other 5000 or 6000 3-credit courses

academic_policies.gpa_requirement: Grade of ‘B’ (3.0 GPA) or better required for each core HCI course
academic_policies.course_sequencing: Courses can be taken in any order. Core courses do not need to be taken first.

undergraduate_courses_limit.combinations: Up to three courses at the 4000 level OR One 3000 level and two 4000-level courses
undergraduate_courses_limit.pre_approval: Must contact academic advisor (Tiffany) before enrolling to ensure applicability

time_to_complete.typical_enrollment: One or two courses per semester/term while working full-time

resources.planning_worksheet: Human Computer Interaction, M.H.C.I. (Distance) Student Planning Worksheet
